summary: The user is focused on increasing their daily step count, currently averaging 8,000 steps per day, and is tracking their progress with an Apple Watch since January 15th. They are also exploring meditation and mindfulness practices, seeking recommendations for apps and books to support their journey toward a more active and mindful lifestyle.
facts: The user has been averaging 8,000 steps per day and is trying to increase this count. The user has been using an Apple Watch since January 15th to track their daily activities and sleep. The user plans to set a daily step goal and add 10-15 minutes to their existing 30-minute brisk morning walk. The user intends to take the stairs more often and walk during their lunch break to increase their step count. The user is considering using the MapMyWalk and Walk Score apps to find new walking routes. The user has been using the Calm app for guided meditation sessions and is exploring Headspace, Insight Timer, and Buddhify for additional options. The user plans to start with short meditation sessions of 5-10 minutes. The user is reading "The Miracle of Mindfulness" by Thich Nhat Hanh and "The Self-Care Revolution" by Suzy Reading to enhance their mindfulness and self-care practices. The user has been getting around 6-7 hours of sleep per night and is working on establishing a consistent sleep schedule. The user has been tracking their menstrual cycle using the Clue app and has noticed their periods have been getting lighter and shorter over the past few months.
